name: Hod (Patron Librarian Series — #3)
description:
☕ | Coffees and sweets with the cutest if them all!

Time to pull myself out of my kms arc and actually complete this series. This week has been a heart wrenching emotional rollercoaster for me... I'm tired. Wouldn't a deep, restful sleep sound absolutely delightful?

Anyways. Hod's theme is... Coffee dates! Enjoy your sweet time~

Art by mu
creator: RemLyx_A_Cheval
